title: Function/Sub-function by Delivery Country (Pivot)
grain: one row per function or sub-function (Row Labels), with a summed numeric measure split across EXL delivery countries
summary: A pivot summarizing an unnamed numeric measure by process taxonomy against EXL delivery country. Row Labels list functions (e.g. Claims) and their sub-functions (Initiation, Investigation, Evaluation, etc.); columns give the value for Colombia, India, Philippines and South Africa plus a Grand Total. It shows how work in each function is distributed across delivery countries.
use_cases: How is a given function/sub-function distributed across delivery countries? (segment)
Which delivery country carries the most of a given function? (ranking)
Grand total for a function or sub-function across all countries (lookup)

not_answerable.q: Which specific measure is being summed (staff, volume, or something else)?
not_answerable.reason: the sheet labels the values only as a Grand Total; the underlying measure name is not stated on the sheet

not_answerable.q: Which client do these figures belong to?
not_answerable.reason: the pivot is aggregated across clients; there is no client dimension in this sheet

warnings: generic sheet name ('Sheet1'); the summed measure is not labeled on the sheet
Row Labels mixes function (L1) and sub-function (L2) levels with hierarchical subtotals
